product_name: Hoco W114 Magic Four Mode Gaming Headphones
description:
Hoco W114 Magic Four Mode Gaming Headphones
Product Details:
Four preset sound modes on the Hoco W114 Magic Four-Mode Gaming Headphones allow users to switch effortlessly between optimized audio profiles for gaming, music, chat, and custom sound, delivering immersive directional effects, enhanced bass, clear dialogue, and personalized tones to suit different entertainment needs.
Dynamic Audio Drivers produce rich, balanced sound with impactful lows, articulate mids, and crisp highs, elevating game soundtracks, on-screen effects, and music playback while providing clarity and depth that make details stand out whether gaming or watching media.
The adjustable boom microphone ensures clear voice communication for multiplayer gaming, chat, and streaming sessions, with focused voice pickup that reduces background noise and maintains reliable performance during online interaction or team coordination.
Comfort-focused ergonomic design features soft padded ear cushions and an adjustable headband that provide secure, fatigue-free wear for extended gaming sessions or long listening periods, making the headphones comfortable for daily use and intense play.

product_name: Acefast H10 Gaming Mode Wireless Headphones - Black
description:
Details of Acefast H10 Gaming Mode Wireless Headphones
Details:
Bluetooth Connectivity:
Bluetooth v5.4 for stable wireless connection up to ~10 m
Supports common codecs (SBC/AAC) for decent audio quality
Gaming Mode / Low Latency:
Ultra-low latency gaming mode reduces audio delay so sound stays better synced with on-screen action — useful for gaming and video
Audio & Sound Quality:
40 mm Hi-Fi drivers for balanced audio with good bass and clear mids/highs
Bass boost mode for deeper, richer sound when listening to music
Battery & Playback
Up to ~60 hours of continuous playback on a single charge (moderate volume)
Fast USB-C charging (full charge ~2.5 hrs)
Some listings claim quick charge benefit (e.g., 10 min charge → ~7 hrs playtime)
